meaning: n.[动]帽贝,坚守岗位的职员
examples: The aim is to study the effects of cholecystokinin octapeptide (CCK-8) on T-lymphocyte subsets in keyhole limpet haemocyanin (KLH)-immunized mice.
A limpet tends and guards its own farm plot.
The next day in Majorca, a limpet bomb under a police vehicle killed two.
They would thus stick like limpet mines to clots, before being burst by an ultrasonic beam to wash the clots away.
Five protected villages cling limpet-like to the Ligurian coast, joined together by footpaths and overlooking a marine reserve that sparkles like diamonds.
